allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { pool } = require\('./db/connection'\); const n = require\('./services/notificationService'\); pool.query\(\\`SELECT l.id, l.borrower_name, l.expected_return, i.name AS item_name, g.name AS name, g.phone AS phone, u.email FROM loans l JOIN items i ON i.id = l.item_id JOIN gemachim g ON g.id = i.id JOIN users u ON u.id = l.user_id WHERE l.status = 'approved' AND l.user_id IS NOT NULL AND u.email IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5\\`\).then\(\([rows]\) => { console.log\('Loans that would get a reminder:', rows.length\); rows.forEach\(r => console.log\(' -', r.item_name, '|', r.borrower_name, '|', r.expected_return, '|', r.email\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { pool } = require\('./db/connection'\); pool.query\('SELECT id, name, email, role FROM users'\).then\(\([rows]\) => { rows.forEach\(r => console.log\(r.id, r.role, r.name, r.email\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\);")
Bash(node -e "const app=require\('./app'\); console.log\('app.js loads OK; type:', typeof app, '| has corsOrigin:', typeof app.locals.corsOrigin==='function'\)")
